message:
fix: Use correct libdeflate flags to disable AVX-512

The flag -DLIBDEFLATE_DISABLE_AVX512=1 does not exist in libdeflate.

Use the actual preprocessor checks that libdeflate respects:
- LIBDEFLATE_ASSEMBLER_DOES_NOT_SUPPORT_AVX512VNNI (disables AVX-512 VNNI)
- LIBDEFLATE_ASSEMBLER_DOES_NOT_SUPPORT_VPCLMULQDQ (disables VPCLMULQDQ)

These flags are checked in:
- vendor/libdeflate/lib/x86/adler32_impl.h:74-75
- vendor/libdeflate/lib/x86/crc32_impl.h:84-85

Fixes CI build failures on all 11 jobs.
